description: This repo contains the samples that demonstrate the API usage patterns for Microsoft Xbox Live Service. These code samples target the Universal Windows Platform (UWP) and Xbox One XDK. To get access to the Xbox Live service, you can join the Xbox Live Creators Program at https://aka.ms/xblcp, or apply to the ID@Xbox program at http://www.xbox.com/en-us/Developers/id
name: xbox-live-samples
